ns0:entry.ns0:title: 00-Evan/shattered-pixel-dungeon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/00-Evan/shattered-pixel-dungeon
Language: java
Shattered Pixel Dungeon is an open-source traditional roguelike dungeon crawler with randomized levels and enemies, and hundreds of items to collect and use. It's based on the source code of Pixel Dungeon, by Watabou.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DrKLO/Telegram
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DrKLO/Telegram
Language: java
Telegram for Android source

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GeyserMC/Geyser
Language: java
A bridge/proxy allowing you to connect to Minecraft: Java Edition servers with Minecraft: Bedrock Edition.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LawnchairLauncher/lawnchair
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LawnchairLauncher/lawnchair
Language: java
No clever tagline needed.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MojoLauncher/MojoLauncher
Language: java
A Minecraft: Java Edition launcher, based on PojavLauncher

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra
Language: java
Ghidra is a software reverse engineering (SRE) framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OtterMind/Chat2DB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OtterMind/Chat2DB
Language: java
AI-driven database tool and SQL client, The hottest GUI client, supporting MySQL, Oracle, PostgreSQL, DB2, SQL Server, DB2, SQLite, H2, ClickHouse, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TeamNewPipe/NewPipe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TeamNewPipe/NewPipe
Language: java
A libre lightweight streaming front-end for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TheAlgorithms/Java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheAlgorithms/Java
Language: java
All Algorithms implemented in Java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageerle/ruoyi-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageerle/ruoyi-ai
Language: java
面向企业级市场的一站式AI应用开发框架，支持多厂商大模型统一接入与管理，具备安全可控的企业知识库与高精度检索优化能力，提供可视化流程编排、自主决策智能体与多智能体协同调度，兼容主流 Agent Skill 协议，帮助企业与开发者零门槛快速构建安全、高效、可落地的AI智能体应用与行业解决方案。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/nacos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/nacos
Language: java
an easy-to-use dynamic service discovery, configuration and service management platform for building AI cloud native applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anonfaded/FadCam
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anonfaded/FadCam
Language: java
Open-source, ad-free Android multimedia recorder with background video recording, screen recording, live streaming, and remote camera control

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/cassandra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/cassandra
Language: java
Open source transactional distributed database. Linear scalability and proven fault-tolerance on commodity hardware or cloud infrastructure without compromising performance.

Apache RocketMQ is a cloud native messaging and streaming platform, making it simple to build event-driven applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/skillhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/skillhub
Language: java
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microg/GmsCore
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nageoffer/ragent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nageoffer/ragent
Language: java
企业级 Agentic RAG 智能体 - 全链路覆盖文档解析、多路检索、意图识别、问题重写、会话记忆、MCP 工具调用与深度思考。面向真实业务场景，从 0 到 1 完整工程实现。
